race.comment: GOLDEN VADER (4) was below her best last time, finishing sixth over 1100m at Scone. Faces an easier assignment and will appreciate the conditions. ALBY'S MATE (2) produced a solid effort last time when fifth over 1006m at Port Macquarie after he was handy all the way. The extra journey should play into his hands. Likely to play a major role. FIREUP (3) was out of the money two runs back then again missed the frame last start when sixth over 1280m at Muswellbrook. Finds the right race this time and can turn things around. WHISPERING RUPERT (1) hasn't been able to break through for an extended period, the latest effort a seventh over 1206m at Port Macquarie. Has the talent to figure prominently.
